testcase.name: verify_acct_opening
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Congrats Account Created expected [ACCOUNT CREATED!] but found [no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//*[ contains(text(),'Account Created!')]"} (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.80) For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#nosuchelementexception Build info: version: '4.41.0', revision: '9fc754f' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '25' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [23dff2632a47ac2022e92aa1680c7dd6, findElement {using=xpath, value=//*[ contains(text(),'Account Created!')]}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 146.0.7680.80, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 146.0.7680.153 (85fd829a1b2..., userDataDir: C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Loca...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:53385}, goog:processID: 7224, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:53385/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 146.0.7680.80, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 23dff2632a47ac2022e92aa1680c7dd6] at testCases.TC001_AccountSignUp.verify_acct_opening(TC001_AccountSignUp.java:56) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604) ...
